jobs.title: Partner Solution Architect
jobs.content: <p><strong>Partner Solution Architect</strong></p><p>Starburst is the enterprise-distribution Trino-managed-platform pioneered around SQL-federation-across-data-lakes & the data-federation segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Galaxy
jobs.content: <p>Lead Starburst's Galaxy engineering function across the managed-Trino-SaaS / Stargate / Warp Speed platform.</p>
